Reference

All functions

`[[`(<dataFrame>) `[`(<dataFrame>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>) `$`(<dataFrame>) `[`(<cfStation>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>) `[`(<cfDataList>,<ANY>,<ANY>,<ANY>) `[[`(<cfDataList>) `[`(<cfDatatype>,<ANY>,<missing>,<missing>)

Subsetting Methods for Clifro Objects

cf_datatype()

The Clifro Datatype Object

cf_station()

The Clifro Station Object

cf_user()

The Clifro User Object

cf_curl_opts()

Store curl options for use within clifro

cf_find_station()

Search for Clifro Stations

cf_last_query()

Retrieve Last Query Result from CliFlo

cf_query()

Retrieve Data from the National Climate Database

cf_save_kml()

Save Clifro Station Information to a KML File

clifro

From CliFlo to clifro: Enhancing The National Climate Database With R

`+`(<cfStation>,<cfStation>) `+`(<cfDatatype>,<cfDatatype>)

Arithmetic Operators for Clifro Objects

dimnames(<dataFrame>) dim(<dataFrame>)

Dimension Attributes of a Clifro Object

plot(<cfEarthTemp>,<missing>)

Plot Earth Temperatures

plot(<cfPressure>,<missing>)

Plot Mean Sea Level Atmospheric Pressure

plot(<cfRain>,<missing>)

Plot Rain Time series

plot(<cfScreenObs>,<missing>)

Plot Screen Observations

plot(<cfSunshine>,<missing>)

Plot Sunshine Hours

plot(<cfTemp>,<missing>)

Plot Temperature Range

plot(<cfWind>,<missing>) direction_plot(<cfWind>,<missing>) direction_plot(<cfDataList>,<missing>) direction_plot(<cfDataList>,<numeric>) speed_plot(<cfWind>,<missing>) speed_plot(<cfDataList>,<missing>) speed_plot(<cfDataList>,<numeric>)

Plot Clifro Wind Objects

plot(<cfDataList>,<numeric>) plot(<cfDataList>,<missing>) plot(<cfOther>,<missing>)

Default Clifro Plotting

summary(<cfUser>)

Summarise User Information

summary(<cfWind>)

Summarise Clifro Wind Data

windrose()

Plot a windrose
